articles.title: Mass. man wins $1M prize on lottery ticket bought at Kowloon
articles.description:
Weiju Huang received $650,000, before taxes.

The post Mass. man wins $1M prize on lottery ticket bought at Kowloon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Weiju Huang won a $1M lottery prize at Kowloon in Saugus, MA.
Huang received $650,000 after taxes from the winnings.
The win could boost local economy and inspire more lottery ticket purchases.

articles.title: Tom Brady trolls Kevin Hart with ‘newborn-sized’ jersey at Netflix roast
articles.description:
"Who is squirming in that little high chair now?" the seven-time Super Bowl champion asked.

The post Tom Brady trolls Kevin Hart with ‘newborn-sized’ jersey at Netflix roast appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tom Brady humorously trolled Kevin Hart during a Netflix roast event.
Brady wore a 'newborn-sized' jersey, referencing Hart's stature.
This playful exchange highlights Boston's connection to Brady's ongoing celebrity presence.

articles.title: Are you traveling this summer? Tell us if your plans have changed.
articles.description:
A recent poll found that 24% of Americans have reconsidered their travel plans.

The post Are you traveling this summer? Tell us if your plans have changed. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 24% of Americans reconsidered summer travel plans, affecting local tourism in Boston.
Poll results indicate potential decrease in visitors to Boston attractions this summer.
Local businesses may face reduced revenue due to changing travel intentions.

articles.title: NH authorities seeking ‘violent,’ ‘armed and dangerous’ fugitive
articles.description:
Lisa Marie Lundstrom, 47, is accused of absconding from probation supervision in both New Hampshire and Massachusetts.

The post NH authorities seeking ‘violent,’ ‘armed and dangerous’ fugitive appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire authorities are searching for fugitive Lisa Marie Lundstrom, 47, considered armed and dangerous.
Lundstrom absconded from probation supervision in both New Hampshire and Massachusetts.
Residents in Boston should remain vigilant due to her violent history and current fugitive status.

articles.title: Local obituary: Kai Prescott and Ella Brayton MacAusland, Wellesley siblings
articles.description:
Kai, 7, was in second grade and Ella, 6, was in kindergarten, both at Schofield Elementary School in Wellesley.

The post Local obituary: Kai Prescott and Ella Brayton MacAusland, Wellesley siblings appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kai Prescott, 7, and Ella MacAusland, 6, passed away in Wellesley.
Both siblings attended Schofield Elementary School in Wellesley.
Their deaths have deeply affected the local community and school.

articles.title: Fidelity reorganizes its workplace with new hires — and a few cuts
articles.description:
The financial giant says it will bring on thousands of new employees while trimming about 1% of its workforce as it restructures its organization.

The post Fidelity reorganizes its workplace with new hires — and a few cuts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fidelity plans to hire thousands while cutting about 1% of its workforce.
The restructuring aims to enhance operational efficiency within the organization.
Local job market may see fluctuations due to these workforce changes.
